---
name: Region Request
about: Request support for a new country/region
title: "[Region] "
labels: region
---

## Country / Region
Name and code (e.g., India / IN).

## Labor Law Summary
Key labor law requirements that affect:
- Working hours (daily/weekly limits)
- Overtime (rates, thresholds, limits)
- Leave (types, accrual rules, carry-over)
- Holidays (how many, fixed/floating)
- Payroll (payment schedule, deduction rules)

## Employment Types
Common employment types in this region (e.g., full-time, part-time, contractor).

## References
Links to official labor law documentation or summaries.
